highlights.title: Tesla puts Starlink antenna in Cybercab
highlights.description:
Tesla and Starlink say SpaceX’s satellite internet is now “directly integrated” into the Cybercab, Tesla’s dedicated robotaxi.
The reveal came through a pair of posts on X on Monday, with a cutaway diagram showing a Starlink antenna sitting in the vehicle’s roof. Neither company explained why a car that drives itself on its own computer needs internet from space.

highlights.title: Samsung Hires Ex-Boston Dynamics Executive in Robotics Push
highlights.description: Samsung Electronics Co. has hired one of South Korea’s leading robotics executives from Hyundai Motor Group to oversee a new robotics division, escalating competition in a sector emerging as the next battleground among global technology companies.

highlights.title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
highlights.description: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

highlights.title: TSMC in Talks to Raise Prices by Up to 10% in 2027, Nikkei Says
highlights.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. has held discussions with clients about price increases of as much as 10% in 2027 to cover the rising cost of manufacturing materials, the Nikkei reported, citing people with knowledge of the matter.

highlights.title: China’s GigaAI Seeks 2026 Hong Kong IPO in First for World Model
highlights.description: Jijia Vision is in discussions to hold an initial public offering on Hong Kong’s stock exchange as soon as this year, joining a flurry of Chinese AI firms planning public market debuts.

highlights.title: South Korea’s Early Exports Jump to July Record on AI-Led Gains
highlights.description: South Korea’s exports extended robust growth in early July as artificial intelligence-driven demand for semiconductors continued to fuel the economy.

highlights.title: iOS 27 beta 4 adds a useful Apple TV app feature, here’s how it works
highlights.description: Apple released iOS 27 beta 4 today, and it comes with a useful new “Automatic Downloads” feature in the Apple TV app. Here’s how it works.

highlights.title: Google Cloud outage shows it’s still hard to understand hyperscalers’ real resilience regimes
highlights.description: Single datacenter and just three services taken down by ‘upstream’ power problem, while the rest of a zone and region kept humming

highlights.title: Bitcoin hits a two-week high near $65,500 as the chip trade turns back into a tailwind
highlights.description: Asian semiconductor shares rebounded hard, a five-day ETF inflow streak passed $600 million, and oil pulled back on Middle East diplomacy.
